user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Herb Scrambled Eggs & Sourdough
fields.short_description: Fluffy scrambled eggs with fresh chives served alongside toasted sourdough bread and grilled tomatoes.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk three large eggs with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring gently until soft curds form. Fold in fresh chopped chives. Serve with a thick slice of toasted sourdough and two vine-ripened tomatoes lightly seared in the pan.
fields.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; sourdough offers a lower-glycemic carbohydrate source; tomatoes add lycopene and vitamin C. A classic, satiating breakfast.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user requested an egg-based breakfast on the day with the 'Smoky' meal. Day 6 contains the 'Smoky Combo' breakfast wrap (and presumably the Smoky Pork dinner), making it the correct parent. Position -1 appends this classic option to the existing wrap variations.
